Definition: Posterior nasal spine - intersection of the palatum durum and the pterygopalatine fossa.
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of PNS (superior pharyngeal / adenoid point).
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the soft palate (inferior adenoid point).
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the narrowest retropalatal level (behind SP).
Deepest point of the vallecula (junction of the tongue base and epiglottis).
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the epiglottis tip.
Posterior pharyngeal wall at the level of the vallecula.
Nasopharyngeal airway area enclosed by PNS-Ad1-Ad2-SP.
Oropharyngeal airway area enclosed by SP-Ad3-Vallecula.
Hypopharyngeal airway area enclosed by Vallecula-Epiglottis-PASbot-Ad4.
Nasopharyngeal airway depth at the level of PNS.
Retropalatal airway depth at the level of the soft palate.
Hypopharyngeal airway depth at the level of the vallecula.
